sidebar.title:
Builder /
Coding Agent
sidebar.tagline: Orchestrates spec-driven code generation. Delegates to shared skills. Owns the TDD enforcement loop.

principle.label: ⚡ Key Principle — TDD-first
principle.text: Code only starts after test contracts are loaded. A task closes only when all contracts pass.

inputs.text: TDD contracts — from Quality Agent first
